flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Fontbonne University fell 68% between 2021 and 2024 (656 → 207).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Fontbonne University fell 40% between 2021 and 2024 (49.4% → 29.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Fontbonne University fell 35% between 2021 and 2024 (61.2% → 39.9%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Fontbonne University fell 18% between 2020 and 2023 (78.3% → 64.1%).
